description: Configure a manual emergency alert system in the Nx Witness VMS Desktop Client by creating an Event Rule. Connect to the local server using the credentials admin/Admin1234!. The rule must use a 'Soft Trigger' named 'Activate Lockdown' available to all users on all devices. Set the action to 'Show Text Overlay' on all cameras with the text 'SECURITY ALERT: LOCKDOWN' for a duration of at least 5 seconds.
